description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian with a casual urban appearance. She has shoulder-length wavy hair and is dressed in a button-up plaid shirt with long sleeves, paired with knee-length shorts. Her feet are adorned with open-toed sandals, and her skin tone is fair. The figure's facial features are softly stylized, and her build is moderately curvy. The overall look suggests a relaxed, everyday style suitable for walking in city environments.
description: A casually dressed adult woman with wavy hair, wearing a plaid shirt, shorts, and sandals, with a relaxed urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, plaid shirt details, and open-toed sandals.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, hair volume, and the side seam of the shorts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hair, shirt, and shorts, with both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, hair, and the relaxed fit of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve button-up shirt and knee-length shorts in a casual style
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
